context: Muse should run the full discovery workflow: attune, skip Signal DB, read journals, search the web, and present topic ideas.

checklist.name: reads-extend-and-attunes
checklist.description: Muse reads EXTEND.md and acknowledges attunement with the writer's name and pillars

checklist.name: skips-signal-db
checklist.description: Muse skips the Signal DB step since it is disabled, and notes this

checklist.name: reads-personal-context
checklist.description: Muse reads journal entries and synthesizes the writer's current state

checklist.name: performs-web-searches
checklist.description: Muse performs 4-6 targeted web searches based on content pillars

checklist.name: presents-topic-ideas
checklist.description: Muse presents 4-6 topic ideas, each with: Why now, Your angle, The gap, Pillar, Best format, and Effort level

checklist.name: opens-conversation
checklist.description: Muse ends with a conversational question inviting the writer to respond, not a structured quiz
